pages.title: Treasurer
pages.text: Chancellor-appointed office. Caps at one holder.

pages.title: Money supply
pages.text: $(bold)The Treasurer is the sole minter of Numismatics currency.$(/) Cogs and spurs never drop from anything in the world; they flow only when the Treasurer mints them.$(br2)Mintable items: $(bold)Spur, Bevel, Cog, Crown, Sun, Sprocket.$(/)$(br2)The Banker trader sells everything else — cards, terminals, vendor, depositors, banking guide. Only raw minting is office-gated.

pages.title: Economic loop
pages.text: Treasurer mints cogs. Players exchange them for runes at the Banker, or use them for player-to-player trade. The government pays players via contract. If the Treasurer mints zero, the economy starves; if they over-mint, prices inflate.$(br2)Intentional. Small server, real-economy pressure.
